view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of royalty tracking per booking.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of royalty tracking per booking.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Royalty tracking per booking (6% to franchisor)', but the evidence provided does not include specific API reads or persisted state checks that directly confirm or deny this requirement. The prior steps indicate successful bookings and financial outputs, but they do not explicitly demonstrate the royalty tracking mechanism or its compliance with the stated percentage. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence supporting the requirement.
